commands.review_summary:
The PR removes one stale `AGENTS.md` sentence rejecting skill additions into source/repo content while retaining the repo-local `.agents/skills/` guidance.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a documentation/policy cleanup rather than a runtime bug. The relevant verification is source inspection of the AGENTS wording and repository-wide search for duplicate stale guidance.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; maintainers should handle the normal review/merge decision because this is a collaborator-authored policy change.

target.title: docs: remove stale skill folder guidance
target.body:
## Summary

- remove stale AGENTS guidance that rejected skill additions into repo/source content as a general PR policy
- leave the repo-local `.agents/skills/` guidance intact

## Verification

- `rg -n "Reject PRs that add skills|seed-only additions intended as published skills|Skills must be uploaded/published via CLI|public-corpus ownership boundary|Public Corpus Skill Provenance Boundary|publisher provenance" AGENTS.md specs docs fixtures/public-corpus/manifest.json scripts convex packages src -g '!node_modules' -g '!bun.lock'` returned no matches
- `bun run ci:static`
target.author: patrick-erichsen
